title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. brevipes
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. brevipes, also known as the narrow-leaved water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. brevipes include its ability to help reduce edema, alleviate symptoms of kidney and urinary tract issues, and support the body's natural detoxification processes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
